creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Nikolai Lifanov from comment #0)
Hi.
Thanks for your help on this port.
I had plan to unbreak it, but ENOTIME :)
would you please confirm the QA for your patch? (poudriere, portlint)
Also i feel it's okay if you're interested on this port and have more time than me to put on this i can pass maintainership to you ;)

So please, 
1- confirm QA
2- edit patch and replace my email with yours if you're interested on this port and you feel you will have more time than me :D

Regards, Mokhi.
